features: * Pack of 12 Christmas Place Cards * Featuring three very colourful designs of Santa, Snowman and Christmas tree – four of each design - perfect for your special Christmas dinner, party or event. They have an extra special feature of a beautiful 'Merry Christmas' design on the reverse side, so guests across the table will have extra Christmas cheer!

* Details * Each tent-fold place card measures 76 x 76mm (3 x 3 inches) unfolded and are made using high quality 300gsm pure white card stock in a matte finish. They are uncoated so can be written on with ease and are fully recyclable.
* Supporting a small UK family business * We are a husband-and-wife team and we design, produce and hand-package every individual item ourselves
* Plastic-free Protection * Your place cards will be securely presented in sturdy paper sleeves - cutting down on plastic wrapping one item at a time!
* Quality * We take great pride in the quality of our products - a great deal of care and attention to detail goes into every item.
description: Product Description All About Us! Meet the team That's me (Gaynor) and I'm one half of our two-man, husband and wife team that makes up Bright Heart Design. Ian and I work from our purpose built studio to bring you our handmade greeting cards, place cards and paper products to brighten your special occasions! Every single customer is supporting our small business and we truly appreciate every one of you. Our Standards of Quality Ian and I design and hand make or finish every individual item, so we personally make, check and pack every single product before it is sent to our customers. We use high quality 300gsm card stock for all our greeting card products and source all of our materials from local UK suppliers. What makes us unique Each one of our cards is an original design unique to Bright Heart Design and they are all designed, created, cut and individually packed by us right here in our Yorkshire studio.
